reviews.comment:
No me gusta que jueguen con el gatillo del surtidor. Lo hacen para perjudicar al que va a cargar combustible, parece que cuesta mucho ser honesto. No sé cómo es la trampa pero la hay, te carga menos. ESO NO SE HACE, algunos ganamos el dinero trabajando y actitudes como esas nos afectan. Se merecen una sola estrella.

(Translated by Google)
I don't like the way they play with the pump's trigger. They do it to harm the person who's going to get gas; it seems like it's hard to be honest. I don't know what the trick is, but it's there: they fill up your tank less. THAT'S NOT DONE. Some of us earn our money by working, and attitudes like that affect us. They deserve just one star.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9489607436873459405/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURteGRPbllREAE
